From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Book by F.J. Thwaites

A Mountain for Monique

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Author | [F. J. Thwaites](/wiki/F._J._Thwaites "F. J. Thwaites") |
| Language | English |
| Publisher | Harcourts |
| Publication date | 1964 |
| Publication place | Australia |

***A Mountain for Monique*** is a 1964 novel by [F. J. Thwaites](/wiki/F._J._Thwaites "F. J. Thwaites").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

It was adapted for radio in 1965.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=A_Mountain_for_Monique&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: References")]

2. **[^](#cite_ref-2)** ["District radio and TV"](http://nla.gov.au/nla.news-article105877760). *[The Canberra Times](/wiki/The_Canberra_Times "The Canberra Times")*. National Library of Australia. 13 December 1965. p. 15. Retrieved 2 November 2014.
